propositions: Integrate task-decomposition SOTA recommendations R1-R7 into the plan-review gate, validating each experimentally before implementation.

Each recommendation child ships only behind its own falsifiable eval gate; detection-bearing changes are never implemented without a passing eval gate, and rejected/deferred ones record the failing result.
E4 (in-situ A/B experiment) is dropped per the no-A/B operator directive, leaving the experiment set E1/E2/E3/E5/E6.
R6 is a deterministic no-detection coaching move that ships first with no eval gate, validated post-ship via R7 dogfood instrumentation.

Validated changes land directly in the packaged review registry/rubrics with no config-flag or overlay gating; new criteria may enter at advisory posture and are demoted when blocking-FP proxy exceeds 10%.
An experiment failing its validity gate (e.g. E1 kappa < 0.7) or returning an ambiguous result gets at most one documented re-run; if still unclear, dependent R-stories close deferred.
